positive: A stylized, highly detailed minimalist jungle scene, featuring interlocking geometric tropical leaves (Monstera, palm, fern) forming a dense yet elegant pattern. The foliage should be rendered with sharp, vibrant color blocking and strong black outlines, creating a comic book graphic novel aesthetic. The central composition should be an abstract arrangement of overlapping leaf shapes, emphasizing natural symmetry and depth. Use a limited color palette of emerald green, sapphire blue, and deep forest green, contrasted sharply against a clean cream or off-white background. High contrast, vector art quality, perfect for seamless textile printing. Studio lighting, flat lay perspective, ultra-high resolution.
negative: blur, low detail, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, dirty, faded, smudge, noise, bad anatomy, cartoon, photorealistic, messy
